name: JEDZA
title: EVERLASTING

abilities.name: Inevitability of Death
abilities.text: Curse of the Dancing Forest: While this model has a Death token, enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

abilities.name: Weight of the Grave
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate within 4" of this model are dealt 1 damage. Then, this model heals 1.

actions.name: Drain the Spark
actions.effects: Damage from this action is irreducible.

triggers.name: Death Denied
triggers.text: This model gains a Life token.

triggers.name: Losing Yourself
triggers.text: Remove a Death token from this model. When resolving, target is dealt +2 damage.

actions.name: Life from the Earth
actions.effects: Target an enemy model. Remove either a Life or Death token from this model. Summon a Seeker model in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Fate Drinker
triggers.text: This model may declare a (melee) action drawing range and LoS from the summoned model.

triggers.name: Thread Unwoven
triggers.text: Kill the summoned model. This model gains a Death token.

actions.name: Waypoint
actions.effects: Make a Lamp marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Death's Whisper
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or gain a Slow token.

extraction_notes: Totem 'The Kurgan' shown in bottom-right corner
Life from the Earth has an asterisk (*) in the TN column, which is unusual but preserved as null TN value in the data
